calendar.matters:
Petition For Orders: 1) Approving Modifications Of Trust Pursuant To Settlement Agreement; And2) Directing The Trustee To Reimburse Mali Lise Flynn For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-08-291426 The Hope Trust, PTR-09-292835 The DAF Trust and PTR-09-292386 The Donald Alexander Flynn Trust.

Appearances: John Hartog (Guardian Ad Litem) in Propria Persona. Amy McEvoy appeared by telephone for Mali Flynn.

Mr. Hartog provided background, explained reasons for the modifications and addressed issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petitions for Orders Approving Modifications of Trust, etc. and the Petitions for Discharge or Guardian Ad Litem in all three matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Discharge Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Discharge Of Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Orders: 1) Approving Modifications Of Trust Pursuant To Settlement Agreement; And2) Directing The Trustee To Reimburse Mali Lise Flynn For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Report Of Guardian Ad Litem On All Actions Taken To Implement The Terms Of The Settlement Agreement And The Results Of Those Actions
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Report Of Guardian Ad Litem On All Actions Taken To Implement The Terms Of The Settlement Agreement And The Results Of Those Actions
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-08-291426 The Hope Trust; PTR-09-292385 The DAF Trust; PTR-09-292386 The Flynn Trust.

Appearances: John Hartog (Guardian Ad Litem) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Hartog reported that World Wrap has been disposed of (transaction consumated) to the Former CFO (Mr. Richardson) of Flynn Industries, that the letter of intent to purchase the parking lot has been withdrawn, that the parking lot is still listed but that there is no interest, and that the parking lot provides a source of income of $4,100.00 per month. Mr. Hartog also stated that the amendments to the Trust have been prepared and reviewed by all Parties, that he expects a petition to filed within the next two or three weeks, and that he will petition for discharge and request fees. Mr. Hartog also spoke of the relationship of Alex and Mali, and the Burger King sales. The status hearings were continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a Petition for Modification of Trust and a Petition for Discharge of the Guardian Ad Litem.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Payment By Trustees Of Fees For Services Rendered By Guardian Ad Litem And His Attorney.
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-09-292385 (The Irrevocable Trust Agreement Establishing the DAF Trust).

Appearances: John Hartog (Guardian ad Litem) for Alex Flynn. Elliott Steinberg for Mohammad Walizadeh. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Paul Downey. Dana Dunwoody appeared by Court Call for Molly Flynn and Flynn LLP.

Mr. Hartog stated that there was an oversight by the parties, that he has no objections to the stipulations, and that no one has asked him to sign the stipulations. The Court granted the two Steinberg petitions (subject to receipt of Mr. Hartog's signature page). The Court stated that Mr. Hartog could submit a signature page and that it would then sign the orders. The Court then addressed Mr. Hartog's petition and granted his petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.

Petition For Accounting And Report Of Trust Administration; Breach Of Duty Of Loyalty; Breach Of Duty To Make Trust Property Productive; Breach Of Dut
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Continued To Aug-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 292385 The DAF Trust.

Appearances: Shirley Kovar and Randolph Godshall for Mali Flynn. John Hartog Guardian Ad Litem for Alex Flynn. Andrew Zabronsky for Paul Downey and Robert Podesta.

Mr. Hartog stated that he filed a declaration this morning with the attached valuation report of the Flynn Olympic Restaurants and that he provided copies to opposing Counsel. The Court stated that it had a lot of concerns about the settlement agreement, that there are issues beginning with a conflict that the current Trustees of each of the two Trusts are the potential buyers of the Trust asset which is income producing, that the Court is being asked to approve a settlement agreement by two of the three Parties to the mediation, that the settlement is really to approve the sale of the asset and that the language in the release and indemnity protect the Trustees without the Minor ever having the opportunity to come back and alledge anything against anyone. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to approval of the settlement agreement, the sale of the Trust asset, valuation of the asset, the sale amount, the Co-Trustees purchasing the asset, conflict of interest, release of the Trustees and the Guardian Ad Litem, resignation of the Co-Trustees, a neutral Trustee being appointed, the Decedent's intentions, the cost of litigation to Alex, etc. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The 12th Cause Of Action Of Demurrer; Removal Of Steinberg As Gal For All Purposes
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case numbers 291426 The Hope Trust and 292386 The Flynn Trust.

Appearances: Shirley Covar for Mali Flynn. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Robert Downey. David Baer for the Guardian Ad Litem.

The Court stated that the accounting petition on the Hope Trust was put on hold due to the pending appeal and continued it to September 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. In addition, the Court stated that it was prepared to sign the stipulated order appointing Mr. Hartog as the Guardian Ad Litem, that the accounting petition on the DAF Trust filed by Mali Flynn was taken off calendar on August 19, 2009 and therefore, the petition to do with the appointment was also taken off calendar, that it was waiting for the dismissal and that it would not sign any orders appointing Mr. Hartog until it received resignation by Mr. Steinberg in the Flynn and the DAF matters. Ms. Kovar stated that she would file the dismissal on the accounting petition but that she gave no authority to take the appointment of Guardian Ad Litem off calendar. The Court also directed Mr. Baer to submit separate orders for the two separate petitions by the end of the week. The 12th cause of action in the Flynn matter was overruled with 10 days leave to respond and the accounting petition was continued to April 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended account.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petition For Removal For All Purposes Of Elliot Steinberg As Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Elliot Steinberg. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Paul Downey. Shirley Kovar and Edgar Hayden for Mali Flynn (Beneficiary/Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: 1) Motion to dismiss; Deny. 2)Request for Judicial Notice; Grant as to the fact of the filings of the documents for which judicial notice is requested but deny as to the truth of any of their contents.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Demurrer And Motion To Dismiss To Petition For Accounting Etc.
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Elliot Steinberg. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Paul Downey. Shirley Kovar and Edgar Hayden for Mali Flynn (Beneficiary/Trustee).
Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The tentative stands as to the 1st cause of action through the 11th cause of action as follows: 1st cause of action; accounting and report of trust administration; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action. 2nd cause of action; breach of duty of loyalty; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action. 3rd cause of action; breach of duty to make trust property productive; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action. 4th cause of action; duty to administer trust with reasonable care; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action. 5th cause of action; appointment of trustee to fill vacancy based on refusal to act; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing. 6th cause of action; removal of trustee and appointment of successor trustee; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action. 7th cause of action; surcharge of the co-trustees; Overrule as to standing and failure to state cause of action
8th cause of action; declaratory relief that Alex is owner of 10% of Flynn Ventures; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing. 9th cause of action; modification of trust; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing. 10th cause of action; for co-trustees to pay petitioner's legal fees; Overrule. 11th cause of action; for order denying co-trustees' attorneys' fees from being paid from the trust or from Flynn Industries; Overrule. The 12th cause of action; removal of Steinberg as GAL for all purposes: overrule and continued to Feb. 8, 2010. Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Notice Of Demurrer To, Or In The Alternative Motion To Dismiss Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem Probate
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Elliot Steinberg. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Paul Downey. Shirley Kovar and Edgar Hayden for Mali Flynn (Beneficiary/Trustee).

Counsel presetned oral argument to support thier positions. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: 1)Demurrer; Overrule with 10 days leave to respond. 2)Motion to dismiss; Deny. 3)Request for judicial notice; Grant as to the fact of the filings of the documents for which judicial notice is requested but denied as to the truth of any of their contents.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
